name: tonal
when_to_use: 需要把和弦、音阶、音程或音名记法转换成可靠的音符集合与乐理属性时用它而非 AI 心算,因为原生在复杂调式、转位和异名同音上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能较稳地回答常见三和弦,复杂音阶、音程拼写、转调与 enharmonic 结果会间歇出错;Tonal 用纯函数给下游指板、键盘和谱面提供确定数据。

schema.notation: string —— 与 kind 对应的 Tonal 原生名称,如和弦 Cmaj7、音阶 D dorian、音程 3M、音名 F#4

provides._note: headless-primitive:不直接渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵;它是乐理数据生产者。
provides.outputs: 规范名称、音符/音级数组、色度、半音数、MIDI/频率等结构化结果,供指板、键盘、谱面或声音组件消费。

api_surface.note: Note.get('F#4') → 规范音名、midi、freq、chroma 等字段

peer.note: 典型链路是 tonal 解析和弦/音阶并产出音符集合,再交给 fretboard.js 做弦×品位置与 SVG 呈现。

boot.note: 若只需单一域可改导入对应 @tonaljs/* 子包以减小体积;空 name/notes 通常表示记法未命中,消费方自行报错。

isolation.evidence: 纯函数乐理计算库,README 与导出确认全部为数据 API(输入记法字符串→输出音符数组/属性对象),无任何 DOM/document/window 触及。headless-primitive 无渲染面,shadow 内外行为一致→shadowCompatible=yes,三副作用轴均 no。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to convert chord, scale, interval, or note-name notation into reliable note sets and music-theory properties, instead of relying on AI mental calculation, because native reasoning fails on complex modes, inversions, and enharmonic equivalence.
en.why_valuable: AI is reasonably reliable only for common triads by default; complex scales, interval spelling, transposition, and enharmonic results fail intermittently. Tonal uses pure functions to provide deterministic data for downstream fretboards, keyboards, and notation.

schema.notation: string -- Native Tonal name matching kind, such as chord Cmaj7, scale D dorian, interval 3M, or note F#4
